title: pteris ensiformis var. ensiformis
intro: Pteris ensiformis var. ensiformis, also known as the sword fern, is a variety of fern species that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris ensiformis var. ensiformis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
